statistical_test: two-sided exact two-sample permutation test on raw per-chain values
stripe_definition: exactly one LEF leg at an internal convergent CTCF anchor site and the two legs occupy different TAD intervals; anchor status is inferred from position because H5 does not store CTCF flags

boundary_metric_definitions.boundary_pass_event: consecutive-frame leg step across an internal TAD boundary, p-1 <-> p, filtering unload/reload jumps
boundary_metric_definitions.cross_tad_occupancy: same-chain loop spans one or more TAD boundaries; each loop-frame counts once
boundary_metric_definitions.crossed_boundaries: same-chain loop spans one or more TAD boundaries; a loop spanning k boundaries counts k
boundary_metric_definitions.multi_tad_crossing: same-chain loop spans at least two TAD boundaries
boundary_metric_definitions.one_ctcf_leg_stripe: exactly one leg is at an inferred CTCF anchor, regardless of whether the loop crosses a boundary
boundary_metric_definitions.boundary_crossing_stripe: exactly one leg is at an inferred CTCF anchor and the loop spans at least one TAD boundary

loop_length_definition: same-chain LEF span in kb because 1 monomer = 1 kb
